title: Acme Corp wins Denver smart-city pilot
summary: Acme Corp was selected for a six-month pilot to automate municipal OSINT intake and analyst triage.

title: Northstar Logistics opens AI routing lab
summary: Northstar announced a new R&D lab focused on route anomaly detection and shipment provenance scoring.

title: Colorado startups partner on dual-use analytics
summary: Acme Corp and Northstar Logistics signed an MOU to share non-sensitive analytics methods for resilience planning.
